'''Lintu''' was [[Kar Yang]]'s personal [[Droid/Legends|droid]], who accompanied and assisted him on his [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]] missions. Lintu's body was [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]], but his head was cone-shaped, narrowing to a rounded tip at the face, with red bands of [[Photoreceptor/Legends|optical sensors]] placed at the midpoint of the cone.

When Yang was hired by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] to capture the [[Human replica droid]] [[Guri]],<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 1">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 1|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 1]]</ref> [[Savan]] secretly had Lintu reprogrammed to [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on him and report back.<ref name="see3">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]]</ref> Yang succeeded in locating Guri on [[Murninkam]], but the duo were unable to follow her to [[Spinda Caveel]]'s laboratory, as Lintu recognised it was surrounded by a [[Full-globe class-one Imperial shield]].<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 2]]</ref> However when she returned to her ship inside the [[Kajiin Swamp]], they remained hidden, and followed the ''[[Stinger]]'' back to [[Hurd's Moon]]; on the way Lintu explained to Yang that the [[A-OIC|droid]] Guri had to retrieve and deliver, was unique.<ref name="see3" />

Lintu was surprised that Yang was not attempting to attack her on her way, and Yang explained to Lintu that he had no intention of returning her to his employer. Guri was much more valuable than the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] he had been offered. Yang planned to keep Guri for himself.<ref name="see3" />

Lintu waited until he believed Yang had gone to [[Sleep/Legends|sleep]], then reported back to Savan. But Yang had grown suspicious of his droid and overheard the conversation. When Yang and Lintu arrived on [[Hurd's Moon]], Yang sent the droid ahead to [[Scout/Legends|scout]] and shot him from behind.<ref name="see3" />

Later Savan and Prevaro came to the Moon after Guri. [[Prevaro]] spotted the droid's remains, where Kar Yang had shot him.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 4]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Lintu is a Finnish word that means "bird".

==Appearances==
*[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 1|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 1]] {{1st}}
